title: Define a property-friendly Percentage type
scenario: Pricing discounts and rollout allocations both accept percentages from outside the service. They should not flow through the codebase as arbitrary integers.
instructions: Define Percentage, PercentageError, value, and TryFrom<u16>. Accept values from 0 through 100 for policy inputs and reject larger values without panicking.

hints.body: Store only valid values in the private u8 field.

completionExplanation: Percentage establishes a compact policy invariant that can be reused by pricing, rollout, and validation code.
